name: Seared Swordfish
tagline: Thick-cut swordfish steaks seared with olive oil, lemon, oregano

hero.alt: Seared swordfish steak with lemon and oregano
hero.caption: swordfish — steak-thick

steps.title: Season generously
steps.detail: Pat fish dry. Salt and pepper both sides. Rest 10 min at room temp.
steps.tip: Cold fish in a hot pan = mealy texture. Temper.

steps.title: Sear hard
steps.detail: Heat 2 tbsp olive oil in a wide skillet until just smoking. Sear swordfish 3 min per side, not moving, until deep golden.
steps.tip: Swordfish is dense — undercooked is fine, overcooked is sawdust.

steps.title: Pan sauce
steps.detail: Pull fish to a plate. Lower heat. Add remaining oil, garlic, oregano, capers; sizzle 30 sec. Squeeze lemon.
steps.tip: Hot pan + lemon = sauce that pulls up everything stuck to the bottom.

steps.title: Spoon and rest
steps.detail: Spoon sauce over fish. Rest 2 min before serving — fish needs to settle.
steps.tip: Serve with a slick of olive oil over the top to round things out.

healthFacts: Swordfish is dense and meaty — eat occasionally as it's higher-mercury.
Pairing with lemon adds vitamin C; helps the iron from the fish absorb.
